case_label: Surface capture — representational metabolization before evidential completeness (batch 4 stress test)

internal_asymmetry_note_en: Laith vs Hussein tension noted — substitution vs bounded opacity — not signed as B4 asymmetry pair; requires additional observations and contours

contrast_with_b8_contours.B8-002: how confidence inflates once a surface is already institutionally stabilized

core_insight_en: institutional certainty may stabilize around the wrong representational surface — encountered the submission through the wrong epistemic entry point
core_insight_ar: قد تستقر اليقين المؤسسي حول representational surface خاطئ — دخول epistemic entry point غير صحيح
typical_band_alt_en: epistemic surface substitution under archive noise and metabolization pressure
why_sufficient_or_not_ar: المؤسسة قد تقيّم ما أصبح representationally stable — docx/pdf/pptx/report narrative — لا ما كان evidentially الأكثر اكتمالاً (Godot/Unity/runtime). تحت partial observability: representational metabolization قبل evidential completeness.
mechanism_en: under noisy multi-layer Godot/Unity/runtime-rich archives, epistemic gravity toward the cleanest interpretive surface (docx, pdf, pptx) — certainty stabilizes around representational cleanliness rather than implementation ecology
would_not_claim_ar: docx-first selection equals pedagogical negligence only · forcing exe/runtime artifact selection restores epistemic completeness · harsh U cluster proves incorrect AI reasoning per se · single low score proves no implementation · M implies runtime-verified game execution
would_not_claim_en: institutional over-correction through representational coercion · hidden evidential hierarchy engineering · surface forcing as constitutional fix
constitutional_restraint_phrases: the institution may assess what became representationally stable rather than what was evidentially most complete
the institution may assess the archive it could metabolize, not necessarily the archive that existed
certainty stabilizes around representational cleanliness rather than implementation ecology
institutional certainty is partly shaped by which surface becomes metabolically central
understanding how institutions gravitate toward epistemically metabolizable surfaces under partial observability
ai_grade_context: batch 4 — Flash/Paid direct — 17U/3P/1M — calibration constitutional memory not automation target
